name: Grilled Fresh Corn
recipeInstructions:
Amchoor is mango powder; obtain it at Indian groceries.
Cut the limes into quarters (or halves if they are soft). Mix the dry ingredients together.
Roast the corn ears one or two at a time over a hot grill or open gas burner flame until the kernels are lightly browned. Dip the lime sections in the spice mixture.
Squeeze the lime juice onto the corn kernels and rub with the cut surface of the lime to help distribute the spices into the corn. Continue until all the lime slices and spices have been used up.
